content.en:
Time flies.

Ye Xingchen's Ten Thousand Stars Ultimate Rule continued to improve, gradually improving to the Triple Ultimate Rule and the Quadruple Ultimate Rule......

After a long time, Ye Xingchen's Ten Thousand Stars Ultimate Rule was finally raised to the ninth realm.

At this point, his Ten Thousand Stars Ultimate Rule cannot be further improved at present.

"Xingchen, in the future, you will mainly improve the ultimate will, and after the will is strong, you will have a greater certainty of impacting the main realm of the ultimate realm. "

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

It is difficult to improve the ultimate will, like Ye Tian at the beginning, he still used the Blood Sea Ultimate System and then cultivated the Ultimate System, which raised the ultimate will to an extremely high realm.

But now, Ye Tian is already the Ultimate Realm Master, so naturally there is a better way to help his son improve his Ultimate Will, and there is no need to take this path.

......

In the years that followed, Ye Tian only occasionally helped his son, and most of the time he cultivated silently by himself, improving the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule and the Yuanxing Ultimate Rule.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian's Eternal Night Ultimate Rule and the Abyssal Star Ultimate Rule became stronger and stronger, and the human race also gave birth to several Nine Realm Peaks who comprehended the Profound Star Ultimate Rules, and even more Nine Realm Peaks who comprehended the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move.

These Terran powerhouses also began to walk in the Dimensional Sea, looking for more opportunities, and the reputation of the Terran began to spread in the Dimensional Sea.

this day.

Yinduo Jizun informed Ye Tian to attend an Ultimate Realm Lord Meeting in the Multidimensional Realm.

Ye Tian came over immediately.

"Yinduo Jizun, what the hell happened?"

Ye Tian asked.

Yinduo Jizun said: "Mitian Jizun is back, and he has brought back a very important news. Therefore, the Supreme Venerable of the Heavens gathered everyone together to discuss. "

Soon after, one Ultimate Realm Lord returned from outside, and only a handful of Ultimate Realm Masters were unable to return in time.

And this time, the Void Heaven Palace's hard-hit Cang Annihilation Extreme Venerable was also present.

At the meeting, Ye Tian finally met the rumored Mitian Jizun, the other party was a white-haired young man, his breath was restrained, and he couldn't feel how powerful he was.

But Ye Tian knew very well what terrifying power was contained in the restrained body of the Heavenly Extreme Venerable.

Seeing that the Ultimate Realm Masters who should have come had all arrived, the Extreme Heavenly Venerable said, "Everyone, I came from the Ultimate Dark Realm this time, and there is trouble over there." "

The ultimate in darkness!

When Ye Tian heard this name, he didn't have any thoughts, but some of the Ultimate Realm Lords' faces changed, especially the Cang Xuan Extreme Venerable, who even showed a look of fear.

"How could something go wrong with the Ultimate Dark Domain?"

Yinduo Jizun frowned.

Mitian Extreme Venerable explained: "An extremely terrifying Ultimate Creature was born over there, its strength has reached the extreme of the Ultimate Realm Lord, and there is no weakness in all aspects, I have joined forces with eleven Ultimate Realm Masters who have reached the first level, and they can only barely tie with each other. The point is, the Ultimate Creatures of the Ultimate Dark Realm used to be scattered sand, but now they are united by the Ultimate Creatures. Right now, our Ultimate Realm Lords stationed in the Ultimate Dark Realm are completely vulnerable. "

"Mitian Extreme Venerable, what should I do now?" asked Yinduo Extreme Venerable.

The Heavenly Venerable proposed, "I hope that the Multidimensional Realm can send a few more Ultimate Realm Masters to help the Ultimate Dark Domain, you should know very well how serious the consequences will be once those Ultimate Creatures in the Ultimate Dark Domain rush out. When the time comes, many dimensional heavens and the earth will be shattered. Those ultimate creatures have the ability to devour dimensional heaven and earth, and they are truly destructive ultimate creatures. So, we have to keep them under wrap in the Ultimate Dark Realm. "

At this time, many Ultimate Realm Masters were silent, and none of them immediately agreed.

After all, they knew very well the dangers of the Ultimate Dark Realm, what if they went there and fell?

They are all already Ultimate Realm Lords, and they are safe in the Dimensional Sea, as long as they don't cause trouble.

But if you go to the ultimate dark realm, it will really fall!

Ye Tian asked Yinduo Jizun, "Yinduo Jizun, where is the ultimate dark domain?"

Yinduo Jizun explained: "The Ultimate Dark Domain is a very special place at the end of the Dimension Sea, where there are a large number of Ultimate Creatures, these Ultimate Creatures are very violent, and can devour the origin of the Dimension Heaven and Earth, once created a huge disaster in the Dimension Sea, and finally all the Ultimate Realm Lords united, which killed most of the Ultimate Creatures from the Ultimate Dark Domain, and sealed the entrance to the Ultimate Dark Domain, and also sent many Ultimate Realm Lords to garrison there. In addition, the resources of the Ultimate Dark Domain are very good, with many precious treasures, and there is also the Ultimate Darkness Ultimate System, and some Ultimate Realm Masters who have cultivated the Ultimate Darkness Ultimate System are also cultivating there. "

After Yinduo Jizun's explanation, Ye Tian had a preliminary understanding of the Ultimate Dark Domain.

However.

The Ultimate Dark Domain has always been a hidden danger, and the ordinary Ultimate Realm Lords don't care about this matter, because there are people above it, but those Ultimate Realm Lords are now about to be unable to withstand it, and this is a troublesome matter.

If one is not handled well, those ultimate creatures will rush out, and all dimensional heaven and earth will suffer, and they, the pampered ultimate realm masters, will also be in trouble.

"I'll count one!"

Ye Tian was the first to say,

Mitian Jizun didn't know Ye Tian, but he also knew that Ye Tian's strength was not weak, so he nodded slightly: "Okay, who else?"

Eventually, seven Ultimate Realm Lords agreed to go to the Ultimate Dark Realm.

......

Void Heaven Palace.

"Ye Tian, you have many doppelgangers, but the Ultimate Dark Domain is still particularly dangerous (Li Zhao Hao), and there are a very small number of Ultimate Creatures that can even devour the Ultimate Origin of your true body in the air, thus causing you to suffer heavy damage. The Extreme Venerable of Cang Annihilation was severely damaged in the Ultimate Dark Domain in the first place!"

Yinduo Jizun said.

"Yinduo Jizun, don't worry, I'll be careful!"

Ye Tiandao.

Yinduo Jizun didn't choose to go this time, because she was the current core of the Void Heaven Palace, and if she fell into the Ultimate Dark Domain, then the Void Heaven Palace would have completely declined.

Besides, Ye Tian had already chosen to go, so there was no need for her to go, otherwise the Void Heaven Palace would go to the two Ultimate Realm Lords, which would undoubtedly be too much.

Even if the situation of the Ultimate Dark Domain is not very good, it has not yet reached a desperate place, otherwise the Heavenly Extreme Venerable would not have come to discuss, but directly forcibly let all the Ultimate Realm Masters pass over.

Some more years have passed.

this day.

The Heavenly Extremity took the seven Ultimate Realm Lords to the Ultimate Dark Domain.
